titleStmt.title: SII 40.84: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 84. (A.R. No. B. 62 of 1930.) Guttikoṇḍa, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the ruined Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1708, Parābhava, Kārttīka, ba. 13.

Damaged. Records the reconsecration of the images of Nandikēśavara and Rāmaliṅgēśvara, (which had been desecrated in the year Durmukhi) by Akkirāju, who also made provision for offerings and worship in the temple with the consent of Kōṭapāṭi Chennapa-Nāyaniṅgāru, the Ijārādar of Guttikoṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gurappa rāmaliṁ
gēśvarasvāmi . śrī
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1708
Agunēṭi parābhava nāma saṁ .
kā¨rttika ba 13 lu . svāmi vāriki
mana guttikoṁḍayi jārādā
ruḍu rā . kōṭapāṭi caṁnnapanā
yniṁgāri Anumati karuṇaya
Akkirāju mahāre padurāma
liṁggamu cilukūri veṁkaṭa pa
tigāru kiṁddalanu du¨rmukhi nāma
saṁ . Āṣāḍha śu 15 lu bhayirā
lu vacci sthānacalanaṁ ceśi svāmivā
ri naṁddikēśvaruṁni pellagiṁcci viḍiśi
yiri gantu nayivēdya dīpārādhanalu
lēka maṁḍḍenu yiṁka svāmivā
riki saṁprōkṣaṇa cēyiṁci nayivē
dya dīpārādhanalu pūrvapu mānya
lines are damaged
Digital edition of SII 40.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
